chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 368 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution of reference as notices not issued as appl. counsel as publication charges not deposit as yet 28.01.2026 Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant This matter is pending since 2016 without any progress and remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution ever since. Diary demonstrates that on several occasions adjournment was sought and time was sought for compliance, however, today even 10 years later matter remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Even today learned counsel is present and no reason has been articulated before the court for default. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
